class.name: arxlift2s_ros2_control/ArxX5Hardware
class.description: ARX X5 single-arm hardware interface (official InterfacesThread). Instantiate twice for LIFT2S left (can1) and right (can3).

class.name: arxlift2s_ros2_control/ArxLiftHardware
class.description: ARX LIFT2S lift column only (official LiftHeadControlLoop on can5). Does not export waist, head, or chassis interfaces.
